objective: Independently verify the portfolio onboarding: every recorded memory fact is evidence-backed against target source, no product code changed, index is fresh, and no secrets/absolute paths leaked into memory.
acceptanceCriteria: The company-map index is fresh at the current target commit (verify with scripts/company-map status portfolio).

A representative sample of recorded profile facts and module facts is independently confirmed against target source (spot-check package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.mjs, app/api/realtime-session/route.ts, and at least two component/lib files by file:line).
modules.md covers every real module and each status label (verified/hypothesis) matches evidence; no invented facts.
The realtime-session/OPENAI_API_KEY boundary is recorded correctly and no secret value, .env content, credential, or machine-absolute path appears anywhere in .company/memory/.

No product code or tracked product file was modified by this work item (git diff of the target shows changes only inside the untracked .company/ workspace; pre-existing dirty README.md/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md are unchanged by this task).
constraints: Independent verification: run your own commands (git status/diff, grep, scripts/company-map status/query) — do not trust the dev/auditor claims.
Read-only: do not edit product or memory files.
verificationProfile is standard: verify recorded facts against source; do not run product builds/deploys.
Subscription-only (authType subscription). You hold veto power over 'done'.
deliverables: QA verdict report with independently executed evidence
